recommendations.title: The Best Years
recommendations.overview: Italy from the '80s to the present day, through the dreams, loves, successes and failures of four friends.

recommendations.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
recommendations.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

recommendations.title: The Voyagers
recommendations.overview: Time jump to 1939 with teenager Max and his friends as they try to navigate Mussolini's Rome and find Max's missing brother.

recommendations.title: The Big Swallow
recommendations.overview: A man, objecting to being filmed, comes closer and closer to the camera lens until his mouth is all we see. Then he opens wide and swallows camera and cinematographer. He steps back, chews, and grins.

recommendations.title: An Extremely Goofy Movie
recommendations.overview: It's all extreme sports and a life of freedom as Max sets off for college -- but Goofy misses Max so much he loses his job and goes to finish college alongside Max and his friends. But as Goofy tries to get closer to Max, both must go to the extreme

recommendations.title: The Tripper
recommendations.overview: A Ronald Reagan-obsessed serial killer targets a bunch of hippies who are heading to a weekend-long concert.

recommendations.title: Shawn Mendes: In Wonder
recommendations.overview: A portrait of singer-songwriter Shawn Mendes' life, chronicling the past few years of his rise and journey.

recommendations.title: Guy

recommendations.title: Foxter and Max

recommendations.title: Fast X
recommendations.overview: Over many missions and against impossible odds, Dom Toretto and his family have outsmarted, out-nerved and outdriven every foe in their path. Now, they confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced: A terrifying threat emerging from the shadow
